description.zh: forgeax-native 自带 driver 的开箱即用 persona · 不依赖任何外部 CLI 二进制,直接走 KeyVault 里登记的模型。新装环境用这个就能聊。
description.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the forgeax-native in-process driver. Requires no external CLI binary — talks straight to whatever model the KeyVault knows about. Default for fresh installs.
